features: STICK-ON DESIGN FOR EASY USE: Simply peel and stick the patch to the inside of your bin lid. No sprays, no mess – just quick, convenient freshness where it’s needed.
FRESH CITRONELLA & LEMONGRASS SCENT: A clean, citrusy fragrance that helps combat nasty smells. Ideal for keeping bins fresh in summer heat or damp winter kitchens.
LONG-LASTING BIN FRESHENER: Each 5g patch offers continuous freshness for up to 30 days, helping to control odours in the kitchen bin, nappy bin or bathroom bin with ease.
TACKLES TOUGH BIN SMELLS: These bin deodorisers go to work fast, helping to neutralise stubborn odours from food waste, nappies or bathroom bin contents.
SUITABLE FOR ALL BINS: Designed to work in all types of bins, from large kitchen waste bins to smaller nappy bins and compact bathroom bins – perfect for every room.
KEEPS BINS SMELLING CLEAN: Helps create a fresher home environment by preventing bad smells from escaping your bins. Great for use in open-plan kitchens or small flats.
TWO PATCHES PER PACK: Includes 2x 5g bin fresheners, providing up to 60 days of freshness in total. Keep one in use and the other stored for a quick swap when needed.
IDEAL FOR FAMILY HOMES: A great addition for busy households with lots of waste or nappies. Helps keep unpleasant bin smells from lingering in the background.
DISCREET & COMPACT SOLUTION: Small in size but big on freshness. These air freshener patches blend in discreetly inside bin lids without taking up space.
NO SPRAYS OR PLUGS REQUIRED: A low-maintenance alternative to traditional air fresheners. No need to plug in or spritz daily – just stick in and enjoy the results.
description: Say goodbye to unpleasant bin smells with Bin Brite Stick On Bin Fresheners. Designed to keep kitchen bins, bathroom bins and nappy bins smelling clean and fresh, these discreet sticky pads are a simple but effective solution to lingering odours. Infused with a vibrant Citronella and Lemongrass scent, each pad delivers long-lasting freshness for up to 30 days. The easy peel-and-stick design makes them ideal for placing inside bin lids, where they get to work neutralising bad smells at the source. Whether used in a busy family kitchen, small ensuite or baby’s nursery, these bin deodorisers offer a fuss-free way to keep your home smelling lovely. With two 5g patches per pack, there’s always a spare to hand. Compact, powerful and refreshingly simple – these are a must-have for every household.
